channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Buying coffee with bitcoin is easy, the resulting tax burden is not
item.description: A libertarian think tank argues that treating bitcoin as a capital asset for tax purposes makes everyday payments impractical due to the complex reporting requirements.

item.title: The CLARITY Act breakthrough: Why JPMorgan says the U.S. crypto rulebook is ‘close to completion’
item.description: Analysts at the bank say negotiations for the CLARITY Act are reaching a final breakthrough as lawmakers resolve long-standing disputes over stablecoin rewards and agency oversight.

item.title: Bitcoin is testing a level that capped its rally in January, CryptoQuant says
item.description: Macro-driven ETF inflows have lifted prices, but CryptoQuant data signals large holders are positioning to sell near a key breakeven zone

item.title: US should scrap crypto capital gains tax to fuel competition: Cato
item.description: Crypto users in the US are required to pay capital gains taxes on cryptocurrencies, stifling their usefulness as a currency, argued a Washington DC-based think tank.

item.title: Trump’s World Liberty under fire for ‘absurd’ token unlock plan
item.description: Major World Liberty Financial investor Justin Sun called a plan to lock tokens for up to four years “the most absurd governance scams I have ever seen.”

item.title: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin fund overtakes WisdomTree after 6 trading days
item.description: The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust is also within striking distance of overtaking three other US spot Bitcoin ETFs that launched in January 2024.

item.title: China already has the compute to train its own Mythos-like AI: Nvidia CEO
item.description: The amount of capacity and the type of compute it was trained on is “abundantly available in China,” said the Nvidia CEO.

item.title: Bitcoin's quantum debate splits as Adam Back pushes optional upgrades over forced freeze
item.description: The Blockstream CEO told Paris Blockchain Week that Bitcoin should build quantum-resistant upgrades now, a day after Jameson Lopp proposed freezing vulnerable coins instead.

item.title: Bitcoin rally is taking a breather near $75,000. Onchain data shows why
item.description: BTC is up 10% for the month, but the bull run has stalled near $75,000 in the past 48 hours. Here's why.

item.title: Dogecoin jumps 4.5% to nearly 10-cents, outperforming bitcoin and ether
item.description: Breakout backed by heavy participation and late-session buying, though weak on-chain activity raises questions over durability.

item.title: Ripple partners with Korea's Kyobo Life to tokenize government bond settlement
item.description: The deal is Ripple's first with a Korean insurer and targets near real-time settlement of Korean treasuries, though the release stops short of committing to a live volume or timeline.

item.title: Tech stocks push Nasdaq, S&P 500 to record highs as Bitcoin taps $75K
item.description: Tech stocks helped drive the Nasdaq to 24,016 and the S&P 500 to 7,022 as Bitcoin climbed nearly 10% over the past two weeks.

item.title: Bitcoin steady as S&P 500 hits record, but options market isn't buying the peace trade
item.description: Crypto's derivatives desks still want downside protection, QCP says, and long-end yields and gold aren't confirming the risk-on move.

item.title: CFTC probes oil futures trades tied to Trump's moves in Iran: Report
item.description: The CFTC is investigating trades that took place before the US delayed strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure on March 23 and agreed to a ceasefire with Iran on April 7.

item.title: Bitcoin devs bet a quantum attacker will play nice with a ‘wait and react’ plan
item.description: BitMEX Research proposes a canary system that pays a bounty to the first quantum attacker and activates a network-wide freeze, offering an alternative to a fixed five-year timeline.

item.title: BitMEX pitches ‘canary fund’ alternative to Bitcoin quantum coin freeze
item.description: It may be appropriate to attempt to mitigate the extent of the freeze as much as possible, even at the cost of greater complexity, said BitMEX.

item.title: Bitcoin hits ‘near-term selling pressure’ after rally to $76K: CryptoQuant
item.description: CryptoQuant says Bitcoin could be reaching a temporary ceiling after hitting a multi-month top of $76,000 on Wednesday, with investors moving Bitcoin in bulk to exchanges.

item.title: Bitcoin should prepare now, even if quantum is 'lab experiment,’ Adam Back says
item.description: Back said the safest approach is to build optional upgrades that would allow Bitcoin to migrate to quantum-resistant cryptography once it's needed.

item.title: Solana Policy Institute-backed PAC spends millions to jam Sherrod Brown's Senate run
item.description: The Sentinel Action Fund is supporting Republican John Husted in that race, with funding from the Solana network's advocacy group and Multicoin Capital.

item.title: Bitcoin capped at $75,000 as Nasdaq and S&P 500 fly to new record highs
item.description: The Nasdaq was higher for the 11th consecutive session as investors looked past the conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: Justin Sun blasts Trump-linked WLFI's 'absurd' governance vote, escalating feud
item.description: The Tron founder claimed that dissenters would face token lockups and exclusion from voting, while the project said the proposal aims to align all participants for the long-run.

item.title: Ether open interest sees 26% increase as markets rally: Are traders into ETH again?
item.description: Institutional investors are buying Ether again, but a handful of factors could slow market momentum and negatively impact ETH’s rally.

item.title: Crypto PAC Fellowship discloses $11M from Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital
item.description: The committee, led by Tether’s head of government affairs, reported spending $3 million on advertising through a company co-founded by Tether US CEO Bo Hines.

item.title: Google's Latest AI Update Makes Industrial Robots Way Smarter—Here's How
item.description: The new Google Gemini Robotics AI model gives robots improved spatial reasoning and task planning abilities for industrial applications.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin traders cash out 63K BTC profit as price rallied above $76K: Will the market rebound?
item.description: Short-term Bitcoin traders took profit on 63,000 BTC over the past 24-hours. Will profit-taking continue to stall the rally?

item.title: Will Maine Governor Janet Mills Sign Nation's First AI Data Center Ban Into Law?
item.description: Maine's moratorium on AI data centers would last for over a year. Will the governor, embroiled in a tough Senate primary, sign it into law?

item.title: Bitnomial launches Injective futures in US, with eyes on ETF eligibility
item.description: The contracts mark Injective’s first entry into US-regulated derivatives markets and could help support a spot ETF following a filing from Canary Capital.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇨🇳 Popular Chinese commentator 'Professor Jiang' claims Bitcoin is a "CIA operation." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5mT0FPal9ELXhDTUhSMFN3YUJVUWRRV2ZFUEtVSm4ybS01TW9FSmRHVDAweUtUa3RPZlNqMUxIMmNpTlF1X2VrYnFFU0RLXzAySF8xc3ZNNms2cXRaS0pLTm5n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇨🇳 Popular Chinese comm…

item.title: Kalshi to create ‘portal for parents‘ on prediction markets: Report
item.description: CEO Tarek Mansour said in an interview that Kalshi would prevent kids from using a parent’s ID to skirt its age restrictions by launching a parent portal and AI verification.

item.title: You Switched to Claude Over Surveillance Fears. Now It Wants Your Passport
item.description: Anthropic quietly rolled out government ID and selfie verification for Claude—a first among major AI chatbots, and a peculiar pivot for a company whose privacy stance just drove a record wave of users away from ChatGPT.

item.title: World Liberty Wants WLFI Locked Beyond Trump's Second Term—Investors Aren't Thrilled
item.description: World Liberty Financial's early supporters vented frustrations after the Trump-backed crypto venture released a four-year vesting schedule.

item.title: Binance Launches In-App Chatroom Enabling Real-Time Messaging and Crypto Transfers Binance has launched a “Chatroom” feature integrated within its platform, enabling users to interact in real time and transfer crypto assets directly within chats; users ca - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBvYUh6bjJQeExPLWp0MmJxc09wUmxheW43R1hpeTJTdVpQa1dZbXh1d2REWTdwbVlyLXlzckE0Z2pteWN6VUZMWDF1ejdhSlJNUWZmZEQySzVGUDNxc0gtVVc4dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance Launches In-App Chatroom…

item.title: 'Killing Satoshi': $70M Bitcoin Film Starring Casey Affleck Will Make Heavy Use of AI
item.description: A $70 million feature film focusing on Bitcoin and the hunt for creator Satoshi Nakamoto will lean heavily on AI tools.

item.title: Bitwise debuts Avalanche ETP offering AVAX exposure and yield
item.description: The product is designed to generate yield by participating in network validation, adding an income component to passive exposure.

item.title: Crypto's new $11 million PAC booked millions in ads with firm started by Tether US CEO
item.description: While Tether has been closely associated with the emerging political action committee, the opening funding came from Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital.

item.title: CoreWeave signs $6B deal with Jane Street to provide AI compute power
item.description: Jane Street said it needs GPU-based computing power to keep its trading and research operations competitive amid growing adoption of AI.

item.title: UK asset manager puts $68 billion of funds on-chain via Calastone token network
item.description: Legal & General Asset Management brings decades-old money market funds onto blockchain rails to expand access and enable faster settlement.

item.title: JUST IN: Coffeezilla publishes video taking on Bitcoin believer Michael Saylor & Strategy's $STRC. Coffee says Saylor's STRC preferred-stock pitch is too simple & the risks are not properly explained. "It's been compared to the iPhone. It's been compared to a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE04QVdtdl9CVWVEX25mSDFkTFo5b1BoMWQzcHYxdmRYa1R0ZXlKN0xmRk5pRHhOMENHR2JxVVc3cmhXVTVlLU9jWUR0bmt3eVBJcXM4WDdsV01mLUpUcTdORGlIZw?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coffeezilla publishes v…

item.title: Tether adds $70 million in bitcoin to reserves, bringing holdings above 97,000 BTC
item.description: The USDT stablecoin issuer has now accumulated over $7.1 billion in bitcoin as part of its strategy to recycle up 15% of its profit into BTC.

item.title: Free Qwen Is Dead: Alibaba Shuts Down Qwen Code Free Tier
item.description: Alibaba shut down Qwen Code's free tier today, following MiniMax's license bait-and-switch. The idea that Chinese labs are the "open-source good guys" is crumbling fast.

item.title: Price predictions 4/15: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: A Bitcoin daily candlestick close above $76,000 would complete a bullish trend reversal and shift the bulls’ short-term price target to $84,000. Will altcoins follow the rally?

item.title: The Protocol: Bitcoin proposal that could freeze quantum-related coins
item.description: Also: AI agents & crypto payments, CoW Swap hijack, ZK proofs on XRPL.

item.title: Try a LattAI? Starbucks Debuts ChatGPT App for AI Drink Suggestions
item.description: Starbucks’ ChatGPT integration lets customers describe their mood or upload photos to receive AI-generated drink picks.

item.title: Anthropic Preps Opus 4.7 and Full-Stack AI Studio—While Sitting on Something Much Scarier
item.description: Leaked models, a new design tool, and an unreleaseable cyber weapon walk into a press cycle.

item.title: US midterm election mirrors 2024 as crypto PACs move into Ohio races
item.description: Potential conflicts of interest in the state’s gubernatorial race and a pro-crypto Super PAC endorsing a Republican candidate for Senate could cloud the 2026 race.

item.title: L&G brings £50B liquidity funds onchain via Calastone tokenized network
item.description: London-based Legal & General Asset Management is the latest global asset manager to expand distribution across blockchain networks and trading models.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Posts $3.8 Billion Quarterly Loss Due to Ethereum Price Plunge
item.description: Leading Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies posted a major loss thanks to unrealized losses on its ETH.

item.title: eToro Acquires Self-Custody Crypto Wallet Firm Zengo for $70 Million
item.description: The deal signals eToro's strategic push into self-custody solutions amid growing demand for non-custodial crypto infrastructure.

item.title: Wall Street won’t buy ‘trustless’ security promises
item.description: Chen argues that crypto exchange security is still mostly theater, and that stricter enforcement is essential.

item.title: Pakistan Lifts 8-Year Crypto Banking Ban Following Trump Family, Binance Deals
item.description: Banks in Pakistan can now provide services to registered crypto firms—but not trade crypto themselves—after a 2018 ban was rescinded.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Fighting fraud in the digital age: why state-led identity is the future
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Tricia Gallagher writes how the fix for broken digital identity systems will need to be state-led and user-controlled.

item.title: Online Casino Operator's Stock Surges on Crypto.com Prediction Market Deal
item.description: Shares in High Roller Technologies nearly doubled Tuesday after the firm announced it was entering the prediction markets space.

item.title: Bitcoin developer Jameson Lopp says it's better to freeze 5.6 million BTC than let hackers have them
item.description: Lopp says dormant coins could pose systemic risk if quantum computing gives attackers the ability to grab them, intensifying the growing “freeze or not freeze” debate.

item.title: Why Morgan Stanley's CFO sees tokenization as the next big step for its multi-trillion wealth business
item.description: Morgan Stanley CFO Sharon Yeshaya says the bank is eyeing a "tokenized world" where blockchain technology allows client assets and liabilities to move more efficiently across its wealth management platform.

item.title: 'Nothing Ever Happens': This Bot Always Bets 'No' on Polymarket, And It Has a Point
item.description: Sterling Crispin's 'Nothing Ever Happens' bot automatically buys "No" on every non-sports Polymarket it finds. It's not that crazy.

item.title: New Bitcoin Proposal Would Freeze Coins to Counter Quantum Threat
item.description: The proposal would phase out Bitcoin's original security methods and freeze coins that don't move in time.

item.title: Can AI Beat the Sports Betting Market? 8 of the Top Models Tried
item.description: KellyBench put Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok through a full Premier League season of betting. Not one turned a profit. Here's why.

item.title: Allbirds Stock Spikes 400% on Pivot From Shoe Brand to AI Compute—Yes, Really
item.description: Sustainable footwear company Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI and enter the GPU-as-a-service market. Investors love the pivot.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Warns Elon Musk's X Money Threatens 'Stability of the Financial System'
item.description: The Massachusetts Senator warned of consumer protection gaps as Musk's payment platform launches amid weakened federal oversight.
